title: Install the immutable SpecSync 5.0.1 action before the hosted Trust lifecycle
description: Install the immutable SpecSync 5.0.1 action before the hosted Trust lifecycle
no_spec_change_rationale: This hosted-runner setup correction makes the approved strict governance lifecycle executable and does not change Agent 3MD runtime behavior or canonical contracts.
